source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Suppose you have been supplied with a number of sheets of two types of optically active material. Sheets of type $P$ are perfect polarizers: they transmit (normally incident) light polarized parallel to some axis $\boldsymbol{n}$ and absorb light polarized perpendicular to $\boldsymbol{n}$. Sheets of type $Q$ are quarter-wave plates: they advance the phase of (normally incident) light polarized parallel to some axis $\boldsymbol{m}$ by $\frac{\pi}{2}$ relative to light polarized perpendicular to $\boldsymbol{m}$. Take two sheets of the circular polarizer you constructed in part (b). Flip one over and put them together as shown in Fig.~2.74. Suppose unpolarized light is incident normally on this system. What is the intensity of transmitted light as a function of $\theta$?

image_dependency: 题干显式写明“as shown in Fig.~2.74”，并要求根据图示装配两片器件后判断透射强度。
题干还引用“the circular polarizer you constructed in part (b)”，存在对前文构型/朝向信息的依赖，单靠当前文字不一定完整。
输入字段中 `requires_image=true` 且 `text_dominant=false`，上游登记也显示有 4 张相关图片资产。
multi_step: 需要先理解圆偏振器由理想偏振片 P 和四分之一波片 Q 构成，再处理“flip one over and put them together”带来的朝向变化。
入射光为非偏振光，求关于 `theta` 的透射强度，通常涉及偏振态变换与最终强度关系的组合推理，而非单一步读图。
答案为函数形式 `1/2 I0 cos^2(theta)`，说明任务不是简单识别，而是经过物理建模/推导得到表达式。
verifiability: 答案类型是 `short_text`，且给出了明确解析式 `$\frac{1}{2} I_{0} \cos^{2}(\theta)$`，目标输出边界清晰。
该类物理题可通过偏振光学规则或符号推导复核，正确性较容易被后续规则或人工检查。
`registry_passed=true`，题干、答案和图像资产均已登记存在，降低了样本缺失导致的不可核验风险。

decision_reasons: 题干、答案和4张相关图像资产都已登记存在，且 `registry_passed=true`，核心语义并未缺失。
初步评分较高：`image_dependency_score=0.95`、`multi_step_score=0.78`、`verifiability_score=0.91`，说明样本有保留价值且答案可核验。
但题干明确依赖图示，并带有 `depends_on_prior_part_context` 风险，引用了“part (b)”中的已构造装置，当前样本的自洽性存在不确定性。
按 Collection 阶段高召回原则，这类仍具可恢复核心语义但存在上下文缺口的样本更适合先进入候选池并降低优先级，而不是直接 reject。
